title: Device Home Screen  - Connecting HS without internet access
scenario: Headset pairing and connection via Poly Studio Mobile app succeeds when phone has no internet access (WiFi and cellular off)
steps: 1. Turn off WiFi and cellular data on the phone (enable Airplane Mode).
2. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
3. On the Home screen, tap the '+' or 'Add Device' button to start pairing.
4. Put the headset into pairing mode (press and hold the Bluetooth button until the LED flashes red/blue).
5. Wait for the headset to appear in the available devices list on the Home screen.
6. Tap the headset name to initiate pairing and connection.
7. Observe the device list on the Home screen after pairing completes.
expected: The headset appears as 'Connected' in the device list on the Home screen of the Poly Studio Mobile app, even without internet access.
